data.title: validate-config.sh: preplanning.interactive key not in KNOWN_KEYS -> validate-config.sh exits with error
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.

## Expected Behavior
preplanning.interactive appears in KNOWN_KEYS in validate-config.sh so validate-config.sh exits 0 when the key is present.

## Actual Behavior
The key is missing from KNOWN_KEYS. This is consistent with ~20 other pre-existing unregistered keys in the same file (worktree.isolation_enabled, monitoring.tool_errors, etc.), so it causes no new CI breakage but is an incomplete registration from task d481-3e6c.

## File
plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh (KNOWN_KEYS array missing preplanning.interactive)

Category: maintainability
